verses.text: Ten curtains of fine twined linen with cherubims are made, coupled together. The curtains. The tent is woven with beauty.
Ten curtains of fine twined linen with cherubims are made, coupled together. The curtains. The tent is woven with beauty.
Ten curtains of fine twined linen with cherubims are made, coupled together. The curtains. The tent is woven with beauty.
Loops of blue and taches of gold couple the curtains into one. Joined. The whole is made one tabernacle.
Loops of blue and taches of gold couple the curtains into one. Joined. The whole is made one tabernacle.
Loops of blue and taches of gold couple the curtains into one. Joined. The whole is made one tabernacle.
Eleven curtains of goats' hair form a tent over the tabernacle. The covering. A tent of hair shields the holy place.
Eleven curtains of goats' hair form a tent over the tabernacle. The covering. A tent of hair shields the holy place.
Eleven curtains of goats' hair form a tent over the tabernacle. The covering. A tent of hair shields the holy place.
Eleven curtains of goats' hair form a tent over the tabernacle. The covering. A tent of hair shields the holy place.
Taches of brass couple it; the remnant hangs over the back. Covered. The tent overspreads the sanctuary.
Taches of brass couple it; the remnant hangs over the back. Covered. The tent overspreads the sanctuary.
Taches of brass couple it; the remnant hangs over the back. Covered. The tent overspreads the sanctuary.
Coverings of rams' and badgers' skins; boards of shittim wood. Coverings. Plain without, glorious within.
Coverings of rams' and badgers' skins; boards of shittim wood. Coverings. Plain without, glorious within.
Boards of shittim wood with tenons stand in sockets of silver. The boards. The frame is firmly set.
Boards of shittim wood with tenons stand in sockets of silver. The boards. The frame is firmly set.
Boards of shittim wood with tenons stand in sockets of silver. The boards. The frame is firmly set.
Boards of shittim wood with tenons stand in sockets of silver. The boards. The frame is firmly set.
Boards for the north and the west sides are made. The sides. The walls enclose the holy place.
Boards for the north and the west sides are made. The sides. The walls enclose the holy place.
Boards for the north and the west sides are made. The sides. The walls enclose the holy place.
Corner boards strengthen the back of the tabernacle. Corners. The structure is braced and sure.
Corner boards strengthen the back of the tabernacle. Corners. The structure is braced and sure.
Corner boards strengthen the back of the tabernacle. Corners. The structure is braced and sure.
Bars of shittim wood hold the boards; raise it 'according to the fashion which was shewed.' Joined. The structure is bound as one.
Bars of shittim wood hold the boards; raise it 'according to the fashion which was shewed.' Joined. The structure is bound as one.
Bars of shittim wood hold the boards; raise it 'according to the fashion which was shewed.' Joined. The structure is bound as one.
Bars of shittim wood hold the boards; raise it 'according to the fashion which was shewed.' Joined. The structure is bound as one.
Bars of shittim wood hold the boards; raise it 'according to the fashion which was shewed.' Joined. The structure is bound as one.
A veil of blue with cherubims divides the holy from the most holy place. The veil. A barrier guards God's holiest dwelling.
A veil of blue with cherubims divides the holy from the most holy place. The veil. A barrier guards God's holiest dwelling.
A veil of blue with cherubims divides the holy from the most holy place. The veil. A barrier guards God's holiest dwelling.
The mercy seat goes on the ark within; a hanging is set at the tent's door. Within. The ark rests behind the veil.
The mercy seat goes on the ark within; a hanging is set at the tent's door. Within. The ark rests behind the veil.
